## Summary

Describe the change in one or two short paragraphs.

## Why

Explain the operator, maintainer, or CI problem this PR solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `docker compose config`
- [ ] `docker compose build`
- [ ] `docker compose up -d`
- [ ] `docker compose ps`
- [ ] relevant docs updated

## Notes

Call out anything reviewers should pay special attention to, especially around persistence, licensing, CI, or first-run behavior.
